title: polystichum thomsonii
intro: Polystichum thomsonii, also known as Thomson's holly fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polystichum thomsonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Polystichum thomsonii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
